hero.subtitle: High-performance VTT for RPG. Real-time sync under 100ms, physical dice read by camera, AI-generated session summaries — all at the table.

systems.label: Compatible with the major RPG systems

grid.title: Move tokens. Everyone sees it instantly.
grid.description: Every map action is propagated to all players in under 100ms via WebSocket. Optimistic UI ensures the GM never waits — the grid responds to touch and reconciles with the server in the background.
grid.bullet1: Fog of War and dynamic lighting with no stutter
grid.bullet2: Soft-lock movement: see when another player is dragging

camera.title: Your physical dice. Read by camera.
camera.description: MediaPipe detects physical dice on the table in real time. Results appear in chat automatically — no typing, no pausing the story. Hand gestures control zoom and pan on the map.
camera.bullet1: Recognition of d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20
camera.bullet2: Gestures: pinch to zoom, swipe to pan
camera.bullet3: Works with phone camera or webcam

ai.title: Session ends. Summary is already ready.
ai.description: All chat and combat events are recorded in structured data. At the end of the session, AI generates a complete narrative summary and sends it to the group via WhatsApp, Telegram or email.
ai.bullet1: NPCs generated with sheet and art in seconds
ai.bullet3: Automatic post-session delivery to the group

features.title: Everything a table needs. Nothing in the way.
features.grid_desc: Dynamic maps with ray lighting, shadows and fog of war. Hex and square grid support.
features.combat_desc: Automated initiative, per-turn effects, HP counters and actions — no parallel spreadsheets.
features.dice_desc: Synced rolls with 3D physics. Complex formulas like 4d6kh3+2 work natively.
features.import_desc: Import scenes, actors, items and entire compendiums. Over 90% success rate.
features.ar_desc: Project the grid onto the physical table with WebXR. 3D miniatures visible on smartphone.
features.offline_desc: Works without internet. Table state is synced automatically when connection returns.

cta.title: Ready to play without lag?
cta.subtitle: Create your account for free. No credit card, no campaign limit during the Alpha period.

footer.tagline: High-performance VTT for RPG. Built for demanding GMs and serious players.
